title: Crumbly Russian Black Treacle Crumble
description: A herbal, crumbly Russian dish featuring black treacle, perfect for a breakfast snack that's both energizing and plant-based-friendly.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Grease a baking dish.
Mix almond meal and black treacle until well combined. If using chocolate chips, fold them into the mixture now.
Pour the crumble mixture evenly onto the prepared dish. Use your fingers or a fork to create small crumbly pieces.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving with fresh berries if desired.
